code:
fn to_roman(_ n: Int) -> String
  let tens = n / 10
  let ones = n % 10
  let t = match tens
  when 0
    ""
  when 1
    "X"
  when 2
    "XX"
  when 3
    "XXX"
  when _
    ""
  end
  let o = match ones
  when 0
    ""
  when 1
    "I"
  when 2
    "II"
  when 3
    "III"
  when 4
    "IV"
  when 5
    "V"
  when 6
    "VI"
  when 7
    "VII"
  when 8
    "VIII"
  when 9
    "IX"
  when _
    ""
  end
  "#{t}#{o}"
end

fn main() -> Unit
  println(to_roman(4))
  println(to_roman(9))
  println(to_roman(27))
  println(to_roman(39))
end
